title: crotalaria mairei
intro: Crotalaria mairei, also known as Maire's rattlebox or rattle box, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the leaves and seeds of the plant are used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and topical treatments, which are said to offer relief from various ailments.
